_comment: Drug catalog for v0.1.5+. Prices are baseline $/gram and per-region multipliers + daily volatility shape the actual market price. legal_severity drives evidence weight at sentencing (v0.4+) and TSA catch DC at airports.
_sources: Baseline prices reflect aggregate national-level US street pricing per DEA, NIDA, and harm-reduction survey reporting. Treat as in-game canon, not a buying guide.

drugs.name: Weed
drugs._note: Federally illegal but widely decriminalized; some states legal. Lowest legal severity.

drugs.name: Meth
drugs._note: Dominant in Appalachian / Rust Belt. DEA NDTA priority.

drugs.name: Heroin
drugs._note: DEA priority drug. Steep evidence weight.

drugs.name: Fentanyl
drugs._note: Highest legal severity. OD risk is dominant cause of fatalities in test region. Cutting other product with fentanyl spikes overdoses (modeled v0.3+).

drugs.name: Oxycodone
drugs._note: Pharmaceutical opioid. 30mg pill ≈ 0.5g. Real prescription paper trail in v0.4+ adds evidence.

drugs.name: LSD
drugs._note: Sold by tab/dose; weight is nominal. ~100µg per tab.
